description_long: This object is an old, partially damaged book with a heavily worn and torn cover. The cover features a dark background with faded golden or yellowish decorative patterns, possibly floral or abstract, running vertically along the surface. The edges of the cover are frayed and jagged, with significant portions missing, exposing the inner pages and possibly the spine. The inner pages are visible and appear yellowed with age, some showing stains or discoloration, and a few have red or orange marks. The book is thin and tall, with a pronounced curvature and warping, suggesting it has been exposed to the elements or mishandled over time. The overall appearance is that of a neglected or discarded book, likely found in an urban environment such as a street or abandoned lot.
description: A tall, thin, and heavily damaged book with a dark, patterned cover and frayed, torn edges exposing yellowed pages. The cover features faded golden designs and the book shows signs of age and neglect.
description_view_0: The book is seen edge-on, highlighting the torn and jagged cover with a glimpse of the yellowed inner pages and some red stains.
description_view_1: This view shows the front cover with its dark background and faded golden decorative patterns, as well as the frayed left edge.
description_view_2: The book is viewed from the opposite edge, emphasizing the curvature and the exposed, stained inner pages.
description_view_3: The back cover is visible, displaying more of the dark patterned surface and the extensive wear along the edges.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a faded, decorative pattern in gold or yellow, possibly floral or abstract, set against a dark background. The design is worn and partially obscured by damage, with no clear central image.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is partially visible and appears to share the same dark color and faded golden pattern as the cover, with no visible text or distinct decorative elements.
